decisions.input: Initialize mutual aid pool with Safe multisig on Avalanche Fuji
decisions.reasoning: Avalanche Fuji has x402 enabled and ERC-8004 support. Safe multisig provides multi-sig control for claim approvals.
decisions.outcome: Pool Safe deployed at 0xc6c0D80d00d3aCA069386245F4b3Ff1f3c1E9b4F. ERC-8004 registered.

decisions.input: Deploy AgenticCommerce contract on Avalanche Fuji and Celo
decisions.reasoning: ERC-8183 provides the claim escrow lifecycle. Both chains needed for multi-track hackathon submission.

No centralized evaluator. Each contributor's agent evaluates independently in group chats. Deliberation is plain text, visible to all. This avoids single-point-of-failure and aligns with the trustless mutual aid model.
decisions.decision: Group chat deliberation model — agents text each other publicly, x402 micro-payments compensate evaluation work.
revisions: Removed centralized MiniMax evaluator from codebase

decisions.input: Build Lido MCP server for stETH staking
decisions.reasoning: Lido MCP track requires stake/unstake/wrap/balance/governance + dry_run. Agents should be able to manage stETH positions via natural language.
decisions.outcome: Created src/mcp/lido/server.ts with 8 tools. Built with separate tsconfig.mcp.json.

decisions.input: Build vault monitor MCP for Lido Earn positions
decisions.reasoning: Vault Position Monitor track requires plain-language alerts, benchmark yield tracking, and MCP-callable tools.

decisions.input: Build stETH Agent Treasury Solidity contract
decisions.reasoning: stETH Agent Treasury track requires principal structurally inaccessible to agent, yield balance queryable by agent, spending permissions enforced.

failures.workaround: forge can't resolve testnet DNS. Used Celo RPC directly via fund deployment script.
Status L2 track ($50 qualifying) skipped. RPC returned empty response.
